Compatible Apps & Projects

Wallets

ProjectSupportsFeatures / Notes
ShockWalletOffers, DebitsPay offers and manage your offers and requests via Lightning.Pub.
ZEUSOffersPay offers, ZEUS Pay provides offers automatically for users.

Nodes / Wallet Servers

ProjectSupportsFeatures / Notes
Lightning.PubOffers, DebitsReference server for wallets.

Applications and Utilities

ProjectSupportsFeatures / Notes
BridgeletOffersSimple NIP-05, LNURL and Lightning Address bridge for your custom domain, uses Offers to fetch invoices from your node.
CLINK SDKOffers, DebitsJS/TS library for CLINK integration.
Stacker NewsOffersIt's like Hacker News but vote and get paid in Bitcoin.
TakeMySatsOffersMerchant platform, accept sats as payment.
